visual_dna.product_description: The Pigeon Air Fryer is a compact and stylish kitchen appliance designed for versatile cooking functions, including frying, defrosting, roasting, grilling, and baking. It features a sleek, dark green body with gold accents, a digital touch interface on the top, and a pull-out basket for easy food handling. Its modern design and functionality make it a practical and aesthetic addition to any kitchen.

materials.texture_description: smooth and polished surface with metallic accents

lighting.shadow_characteristics: soft shadows cast below and to the right
highlights: on the top surface and gold accents

structure.overall_shape: rounded rectangular body with a slightly tapered top

motion_recommendations: slow 360-degree rotation to showcase the design
zoom in on the digital interface and gold accents
camera_angle_suggestions: front angle to highlight the pull-out basket
top-down angle to showcase the digital interface
side angle to emphasize the gold accents

tweet_ideas: Tired of oily meals? The Pigeon Air Fryer brings you healthy cooking at just 3k-5k INR. Affordable, compact, and perfect for Indian kitchens! 🍳 #HealthyLiving #BudgetCooking
Why spend thousands on fancy gadgets? The Pigeon Air Fryer is here to make healthy cooking affordable for every Indian home. 🥗 #KitchenHacks
Cooking without oil? Easy! 🍟 Try the Pigeon Air Fryer today for guilt-free meals that fit your budget. #HealthyCooking
Stop wasting time and money on complicated kitchen gadgets! The Pigeon Air Fryer is all you need for quick, healthy meals. 🕒 #SmartCooking
Did you know? Air fryers reduce oil usage by 80%! Start your healthy journey with the affordable Pigeon Air Fryer. 🌱 #HealthyLifestyle
Small kitchen? No problem! The compact Pigeon Air Fryer fits perfectly and cooks delicious meals. 🏡 #IndianHomes
Healthy meals, happy wallet! 🤑 The Pigeon Air Fryer is your perfect kitchen companion for just 3k-5k INR. #BudgetFriendly
Compare it yourself: The Pigeon Air Fryer delivers premium features at a fraction of the price! 🔍 #SmartShopping
